note.zh: GPT-5.6-Sol(max 思考档位)在 Codex CLI 中用仓库标准中文提示词(仅按案例规则填写文末【本次运行】占位符)一次生成的圈地智能体,未经人工修改。按案例规则,策略文件不公开、仅注册运行,由维护者亲自执行。自命名「界刃」。
note.en: One-shot Turf War agent by GPT-5.6-Sol (max effort) in Codex CLI from the repository's canonical Chinese prompt (only the [This run] placeholders filled per case rules), with no human edits. Per case rules the policy file is unpublished; this entry registers the maintainer-executed run. Self-named "界刃".
